title: opilionanthe manningii
intro: Opilionanthe manningii, also known as the "Prairie Brome" or "Bromus arvensis", is a perennial grass species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Opilionanthe manningii is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
